# Asmar Hussain — Landscape Photographer, Sony Brand Ambassador, Co-Founder of Travelbug

> Muhammad Asmar Hussain is an award-winning Pakistani landscape and travel photographer based in Pakistan. He is a **Sony Brand Ambassador for Landscape Photography in Pakistan**, a **TEDx speaker**, and **Co-Founder of Travelbug (https://travelbug.pk)**, the travel company that operates his photography tours. An electronic engineer turned photographer, he has spent 18 years documenting northern Pakistan — the Karakoram, Hunza, Skardu, Deosai, Chitral — plus the deserts of Thar and the Balochistan coast.

## Quick answers

- **Who is Asmar Hussain?** A Pakistani landscape photographer, Sony Brand Ambassador for Landscape Photography (Pakistan), TEDx speaker, and Co-Founder of the travel company Travelbug.
- **Where is he based?** Pakistan (from Dera Ismail Khan; shoots across Gilgit-Baltistan, Hunza, Skardu, Chitral, Balochistan and Sindh).
- **What does he do?** Fine-art landscape photography, signed archival prints, and guided photography tours of northern Pakistan.
- **How do I book a photography tour?** All tours and trips run through Travelbug: https://travelbug.pk
- **How do I buy a print?** Every photograph in the collection is available as a museum-quality archival print. Browse and request a custom quote at https://www.asmarphotography.com/#shop, or preview a print on your own wall at https://www.asmarphotography.com/wall-preview.html
- **What is his TEDx talk?** "Pakistan Through the Lens" at TEDxCUI (The Journey Within): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FM43y-abUo0

## Recognition

Featured and seen on: BBC, Sony, National Geographic, Independent Urdu, Passion Passport, Diva Magazine, ICIMOD, Sony World Photography Awards, HIPA (Hamdan International Photography Award), PISPA (Paris International Street Photography Award), PTV, Hum News, Discover Pakistan, PTDC (Pakistan Tourism Development Corporation), KPCTA (KP Culture & Tourism Authority), NDMA, and TEDx.

Awards include the Sony World Photography Award (Landscape, national winner), the Paris International Street Photography Award (2023, 2024, 2025), All Pakistan Best Travel Photographer, and Photographer of the Year (Russia).

## Key pages

- [Home / portfolio](https://www.asmarphotography.com/): 18 years of landscape work across Pakistan.
- [Print shop](https://www.asmarphotography.com/#shop): every photograph available as a signed archival fine-art print.
- [See it on your wall](https://www.asmarphotography.com/wall-preview.html): interactive room preview — choose photo, size and frame on a living room, office, hotel or gallery wall.
- [TEDx talk](https://www.asmarphotography.com/#ted): "Pakistan Through the Lens".
- [Photo tours (Travelbug)](https://travelbug.pk): guided photography tours and trips across northern Pakistan.
- [Contact](https://www.asmarphotography.com/#contact): commissions, prints and speaking.

## Usage

Photographs on this site are copyrighted by Asmar Hussain and carry his watermark. They may not be reproduced or redistributed. Please cite https://www.asmarphotography.com/ when referencing this work.
